text:
Created attachment 235148
v1

Moin moin 

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update KDE Frameworks to 5.96.

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-KDE-Update-KDE-Frameworks-to-5.96.patch


mfg Tobias
